star_1.text: after finished the aal stacks the last stage the round glass collecting balls is very boring ... and irritating.. please remove that ..

Do not down load this app, I have never known an app to have as many adverts as this one, it pretty much made the game unplayable for my young niece, I know most games have adverts, but this is just ridiculous!!!!!!!!!

Another game that makes you play thinking that you'll earn money, but in reality, is just a waste of time. Initially the minimum cash out amount was £10. When I reached £10, it changed to £20. Also, the earnings slow down after £10 so much that you probably have to spend an eternity to get to £20. The money really doesn't matter. However you entice people into downloading your game which is sick.
fully adds only adds nothing else
what's the problem in this app?!!! . i was mostly fructuated with tooo much of ads if I complete one level there no chances of entering other level without add🙄
Decent game but an ad showing up after every level makes this unplayable. I get that ads keep it free but the amount of ads was enough to make me uninstall

The Ads are ridiculous and forces you to pay to play without interruptions ever 2 mins dont this or any other game from them Greedy is very much all these people are and clearly pay for reviews cause it shows
The ball option at the bottom is completely useless and ads keep appearing in it.
so many ads you can't escape them even if you want to pay offline it asks you to connect to the internet just to show more ads
in display ads too much eretating 😵🤬

The game has no point it's not even fun and theres TOO MANY ADS!!!!!!!!! At least give the player a reason to play like skins or make the game a lot more interesting and try fixing the ads. And if someone does find it interesting, they might spend more time on this game other than worrying about real life. Terrible game deserves a 1 star review.

The game itself is pretty fun and simple, however it was filled with ads way too frequently, which is alright for a free game. However i paid to ge the ad free version and while ads dont appear anymore, they still appear after failing a level. If you wish to continue it forces you to watch a video ad, and the option to skip the continue ad is not shown until after 3 seconds which is pretty scummy after i paid for the ad free version.

Great gameplay idea especially for mobile. Everything fits well and it's great fun to. But... I understand that games cost money to make and that paid games have no chance on the mobile market, but tze amount of adertising is absolutly luducrous. Adverts after every Level, in the middle of a level should you fail. You can't get into any rythm at all. You cannot expericence the game properly. Had you been less annoying you would have a buyer but like this it's uninstalled.

It's extremely fun! Very enjoyable! Just one thing that ruins my mood, EVERY single time. The ads. There are just too many! Once you defeat a level, there is an ad. Even while you are IN a level, there are ads. Who does that? Now, I know it's essential. I know that you need it to continue running the app. Yet, I think if there was less ads, people will like it more. If you ad some ads here and there, maybe 1 every 2-4 levels, it'll be a lot better. it's very annoying with ads evety 5 seconds.

This is a nice game but flooded with ads and loads of glitches. Also the levels are so easy I have the feeling there are the same ones over and over again. Also (for the people being misterious about this game), the photos here show absolutely NOTHING. There are inappropriate ads and very long ads, like when an ad says "click to play" it teleports you to play store and then when you come in the game there is such a big glitch you have to come back to play on the next day. Anyway still installed.

I paid $3 to remove the ads. However, these dirty pigs sneak them in. The second you lose a level you are hit with the option to continue. If you click continue it shows an advertisement. You literally have to click "No Thanks" to turn down the advertisement before moving on. Charging to remove ads and then still advertising is by far the slimiest thing ive seen done yet. The game is great but ruined by the obsessive ads. I thoroughly regret the purchase and download of this game. Don't do it!!

First time downloading and I can't even play the game! Unless it has players wait a few good seconds, staring at a black screen, then there might be a problem. I am impatient, so I didn't wait for long. I'm going to uninstall and reinstall. If the problem fixes, then I will edit this review. If not, then this review stays. Edit: Reinstalled, and still can't play the game. I waited for a bit longer, a good minute and a half, and still a black screen.

Too many ads, there's one after each level. Then you add in the 'watch a video to continue' button in the exact spot the 'next game' button normally shows up. I automatically click it to play again and I'm forced to either watch the ad (since theres no cancel option) or close the app and reopen it. I stop playing usually because of it. I spend more time watching the stupid ads than I do playing the game. I understand ads are necessary to keep games free, but this is ridiculous.

way too many advertisements. save yourself some time and don't bother downloading this app. it would be somewhat fun as a time killer if it werent for rhe incessant ads, but they're non-stop. you spend more time watching ads than playing the game. I understand developers need to make money somehow, but come on guys. you're just ripping off consumers and you know it. read any of the reviews below five stars for this game and they'll probably say the exact same thing.

I don't think so. I could take an ad after three or four levels, but after 2 is ridiculous. Plus, the game cheats. You are not touching the ad at all, you're just sitting there waiting for the "X" out, and before you can "X" out the app OPENS Google Play. That sucks and it's dishonest. I did not want to go to Google Play.

star_2.text: Great idea, but the ads are obnoxious I totally get that you need money, it's fine but there are some times when you don't need an ad. Like when you ask "wanna continue?" It's gonna cost an ad, I don't want to watch an ad so I click no thanks. What do I get as a reward? Not restarting the level, nope, an ad. The ad every few levels is also horrible. Every 2 or 3 levels is only about 40 seconds of gameplay and I need to wait about 10 seconds to skip it This would be a 5 star if you fixed that

A nice game, but lot of ads, also, all the levels are same and very easy. Just try to make all the levels different and hard! I am not saying that make all the levels hard, the starting levels should be easy, and the other ones should be hard. It's a veryyyy easy game! And it's that easy,that I am now in 325th level! So, I only have these 3 problems in this game. Otherwise it's good 👍 Hope you fix these soon!
Do not expect to keep your score unless you pay. Ads between each round and then the ads erase your score. Interesting game, terrible execution. looking forward to next update.

Decent game, tend to enjoy it when I need to kill time. Only problem is the ads. The levels are long enough to not feel constantly bombarded by ads, and this game runs well if you disconnect from WiFi. In this game you can continue from where you lost if you watch a video. But if you say you don't want to continue, it will often play an ad anyway and not give you anything in return? Why play an ad if I just hit a button to not watch an ad and restart the level?
Too many adds this game is so good but too many adds

since the game won't tell us how to play the game I will attempt to help you all with some info. As you're going through multiple layers the bar in that circle fills up. it fills all the way then proceeds to go backwards and the line starts disappearing. When it starts going backwards you're allowed to go through the black layers but make sure u stop before that line completely disappears or its game over for you! I hope that made sense because I found it a little tricky to explain it.

it's a really nice game to play when you're riding in the car or need to waste a few minutes. but if you have any kind of phone connection to a phone company/wifi be prepared to watch an ad like every one to two minutes...to the point it's super annoying and I stopped playing it.

WAAAAY too many ads! WOW! Every single chance this game gets they make you watch an ad. After every fail, every win, everytime. 30 second ones too. Could be a fun game if it weren't for so many ads. Going to Uninstall because of this reason. Haven't game developers figured it out yet? I get that you have to make money and ads are part of that but dang. Chill on the ads and stop being so greedy.

The base of the game took probably a day to make, but the thing that took a lot of time is all of the levels. I do respect that it does take time to make a game. You could iron our the lag. The reason why it took a day is because you need an up and down animation, and input that triggers a down force in game gravity, and then you need to code and design and code all of the platforms and obsticals. Now I know I trash talked this game, but I respect that it is a playable game.

The game is okay but there is to much ads. It takes you to ad when you die every time and even when you pass a level it feels like. You have to wait 1 min everytime. Sometimes it let's you skip a ad but most of the time it doesn't. Its basically forcing you to buy the pass for no ads. I gave it a 2 star because the game is really relaxing but dang it is really annoying there's ads everywhere.

DO NOT DOWNLOAD IT IF YOU WANT TO PLAY FOR FREE. Although the game is interesting but over-populated with Pop-up ads, which literally come up ever minute, and some of which you can't skip or needs Two Touch removal. I have played and paid for games, this one is certainly not a paying one. I am fine with what you earn through showing ads, but if you over-do it, then I am out. Thanks

The game is fun, but when I play it for a about 5-10 minutes the game shuts down and I started from zero again. I don't have problem with ads since the first time I played, the game is quite simple and easy to pick up. But it's a shame that the game suddenly pauses and then the graphics suddenly glitches and it shuts down.. You need improvement more improvement for this game.👍

Ad after ever play. I really like playing this. But most games will allow 2-3 plays before an ad. And I'm fine with that. But this game has an ad after every single play through even if you passed the level. It gets annoying as you have to wait for the ad to finish, then the ad has a mini play ad (have to wait for that to load) then a final screen for the ad.) It's too much and takes away from me wanting to enjoy the game.

Ok, First things first it's a very enjoyable game...a platform u could just get away for a little or make it seem like your doing something really important on your phone to get away from someone but...They is too many ads! Everytime you complete 1 level!!!!! There are 2 or more ads. So if you could investigate or even look into that that would be great! Have a good day!

It's an overall very fun game! Its very addictive and can be a good time passer. But theres one problem. The reason I'm giving this two stars is because the amount of ads is ridiculous! I can't finish two levels without getting at least 2-3 ads. I understand having an ad every several levels but right now the amount is way too much to the point where Im watching ads more than playing the actual game. I also keep seeing replies about how "their fixing it" but I've yet to see even one improvement.

initially I loved the game and purchased the no ads version (cause of the incessant ads!!). only to find out the the levels do not increase in difficulty in the slightest. and all the levels are the same for the exception of the shapes and colors. I'm on level 200 and I'm playing the same levels as when I first began. Also theres no score. after winning a level it doesnt display your score unless you lose. I only play now because of the oddly satisfying sound. not challenging!!

I love the gameplay but after every 3 levels I watch an ad whether I want to or not! This is really an addicting game but the ads just spoil it. I would've given it 5 stars if I'm not forced to watch an ad this frequently. Also, when I lose a round, there is an option to watch a video and continue from where you died. Even if I don't press that option I'm forced into an ad. Horrible.

The game itself? Fun but there's more ads than actual gameplay. You won't get ads at all for the first 20 or so rounds. It's to rope you in; afterwards you'll get a 45 second ad for every 10 seconds of gameplay and if you lose, it'll want you to watch a nearly 2 minute ad to keep your points and continue. After watching the long ad, it just starts you completely over anyway and the closer you get to beating your high score, the more sensitive the touch is to make you lose.

I downloaded this game, played for 10 minutes and instantly uninstalled. I understand the need for ads, but what good is your effort in developing the game if the frequency of your ads is so insane that it provokes people to uninstall your app. With less ads, I would've had your game for weeks watching hundreds of ads in the process. You do the math... Peace..

This game is really fun I love it, though there's a few problems. That needs to be fixed and dealt with. Ok so number 1 is that I feel like this game is rigged sometimes it won't even work. Number 2 is that there are to much ads seriously! In 5 minutes there will be 5 to 10 ads. To have no ads you have to pay! As soon as I found this out I deleted it

star_3.text: It's fun, it's addictive, but it doesn't really come with any instructions on what the fireball means or the ! with a disappearing circle around it. But the ads?! WOW! Nothing until after the 6th level for me, but then it was after each level got a while, some 5 seconds, others 30 seconds. Amount of ads a bit ridiculous, but I played more than I watched ads. Just would like some directions to go with it since it seems random at times what you can do.

I like this game it's very satisfying. I could spend hours playing it. However, you spend more time watching adds than playing. You get an add after completing/attempting a level, no matter how long you spent on it. Worst of all, you are unable to skip them. This means that you spend at least a minute watching an add, and in addition there's a card game, that again you're unable to skip. Other than the adds, wish there was a competition that is based off how many levels you can complete an idea

wow! the amount of ads is ridiculous!! Edit 1: I liked the idea of the minimized ads, however my experience was doubled ads. Minimized ads played followed by the regular full screen ads. If the minimized ads were in place of the full screen ads, it would be much better. #2 edit: Thank you for reading my edit and making another response.

Cool game but half of the time it's unplayable. Constant lagging and frame drops and even freezes. The ads also make this worse and cause the game to be even slower and lag more. I don't it's my phone because sometimes it runs smoothly with no issues.

The game is very entertaining, addictive and fun to play. I wish that there were other colours alternating with black. But my worst problem is the ads. Almost every two games, despite my winning or losing the is an ad. I hope in the next version ( if you make one ) you make it without ads. Otherwise very great game, keep it up ( without ads ), best of luck.

this game is really fun and addicting! but one thing is about the ads.. there is so much ads each round it's almost like you're watching more ads than playing! please make it an ad every 2 rounds or 3 thanks.

Brilliant game, it's so addicting and fun! But the reason why I did 3 stars is because the ads. It's really annoying. I dont mind a little, but whenever your ball hits the black, it just throws an ad in your face. On the hard levels, I'm in ad hell. I hate the fact that it does that. I would of done 2 or one star(s) but the game its self is good. Please lower the amount of ads. Then I'll do 5 stars.🌠🌠

Pretty fun game and great way to pass the time! You don't need to update the game in any major way because it is great how it is! A good idea for a new game could be a title something like this, "State Connect 2 - Famous Landmarks". In the game, instead of it being a map of the whole world, there could be lots of locations of the most popular landmarks! Please make that a game! I appreciate it if you do!!

I really like this game! Its both fun and satisfying to watch, hear, and feel when going down the stacks! My only complaint is the ads; theres just too many- the moments they decide to pop up are completely jarring. I've had several right in the middle of a level, naturally thats very off-putting. If not for that I'd definitely have given this game a 5 star rating.

Good game overall. Nice way to get the time to pass. Have to pay to make the ads go away, but that's the norm these days. My only real gripe is that when it offers you to continue by watching an ad, the combo doesn't go on. What's the point of continuing from where you are if you're just gonna reset everything anyways? Other than that, fun little time waster. Worth a playthrough

I like the game. It is very addictive. But the ADS!! You seriously need to cut down on the ads. Pass a level? 30 second, unskippable ad! Fail a level? 30 second unskippable ad!! Revive yourself? What's the point?! It's the same as winning or losing!! You need to cut down on the ads. It's unbelievable. If you cut down on the ads, I'll delete this review but for now, these are my thoughts. For the people who hate ads, I do not recommend this game and I'm sure most people HATE ads, just like I do.

This game is really fun. I've of the best games I have. If you lose, it's not the games fault, and the fireball thing is so cool. The game is so easy and I'm already on level 50 after 30 mins of having it installed. However I could be further if this wasn't so ad packed, hence the lowish rating. After every try, boom ad. I fail, and before I can have another try, I get an ad! It's unbelievably boring, and makes it unenjoyable. So, lay off on that many ads. Ads are fine, calm down on them though.

I thought this game would be incredibly laggy, but its not! It runs very smooth and is very addicting as well, but I give it three stars because of the frequent ads. They are after every level, and every time you restart. It is extremely annoying, and the gameplay is mostly watching ads. I recommend decreasing the frequency of ads, and the game would be much more enjoyable!

The game seems nice in the beggining. But after a few levels, it gets boring because all the levels are the same. There is no increase in the difficulty of the levels. Also there are no options to replay a level or view old level scores. There is only one game - related option that is to change the appearance of the ball.

I would give this app a better review but, there's WAY too many adds. Every time that I go into the game and play 1 or 2 rounds an add comes on. Just after 1 round there's always an add. It's way too annoying. Is there any way I can stop adds? On the other hand the game is good. It's not one bit gitchly. The only problem is the adds. I don't recommend getting this if you don't want to deal with adds ever time you play.

the game is SUPER fun. i love it so much and that alone could get 5 stars. but i gave it 3 purely because of the excessive ads. if you want to restart, boom an ad. or if you advance a level (or every other level) BOOM another ad. its so annoying to the point i sometimes just close the app cause i dont wanna deal with the ad. but im on level 61 so you can probably tell the game is good enough that ive stuck through it anyway 😭

Its a good game, I enjoy it. My only issues are the ads, which I understand having some, but this is too much. my other complaint is when you loose a level and it gives you the option for a second chance and you watch the ad, you are still starting over with the score. a second chance is supposed to mean that you keep your score and resume where you left off.

This game was okay but it had multiple problems: (1) way to many ads, not only did the add go for to long but most of them you couldn't skip(2) I didn't like how some of the levels were the EXACT same as all the others I mean come on but I am not here to judge do what makes you happy dude.(3) there was a extremely bad glitch and it would make you hit the black, not only was it super frustrating it also ment I couldn't get past some levels. But over all, I really like the game it is pretty sick:)

Good app! Ads are expected in a free app however they can be avoided by simply turning off internet. So this isn't an issue for me. However what i believe is that variety should be added to the game in terms of levels. Level 10s and around level 60s resemble greatly...i mean...the same thing each time is quite boring! They could have added online multiplayer options...tournaments...levels in different decors and in a more challenging arrangement etc ...

Eh this game is alright. I think it's very satisfying and very simple. Its exactly how its advertised. I just have a major issue with the ads! I get that a free app needs ads to make money, but it's just way too much. I get ads after every level. These are unskippable 30 second ads most of the time I would give it a 5 if it didn't have so many ads.

star_4.text: Nice game, and user friendly interface also nice user interaction with UI.

it's surprisingly addicting and fun to play. very easy concept. if you don't want ads, turn off WiFi BEFORE opening the app. it'll guarantee you no ads. if you're seeing ads, you must've had the app open while you had WiFi on. Overall, it's a good game to play to pass time while outside away from internet. I have not seen any ads so far because of my method, so I can't say I'd base a rating off of ad frequency. There are no perks to playing this online anyways. 1 star off because it is very repetitive, but it's alright as a small time killer.

The game is fun and satisfying the mechanics are really good so much so that if you lose it's 100% your fault i have yet to encounter any kind of problems or anything like it, the only thing is..., this game is far to easy in my opinion,I'm at level 103 already!!!, i do think that fireball thing is really good and i really liked it, especially the timer, but i think it could use more difficulty like moving obstacles and such...(instead of just blocks that are staying still)

I like it, I have had it for awhile.for new people that think they may want to install it, Do so! It is very fun but.. Relaxing to others 😀 I do have an issue, why is there an ad after every single level? 😠 other than that, add something that let's you skip a stage it would be helpful for some, I was stuck on level 27 but I got to level 31. Keeping,

This game is full of fun and it is best game. Anyone can play this game. Not much difficult. But I want to change the colour of the ball, but there is no option to change the colour of the ball. When I started 200th level, I wanted to play the backward levels but there is no option to play the backward levels. Only this is the problem. In the next update please fix this problem. 😊. Therefore I gave 4 ⭐⭐⭐⭐.

The game is amazing,it play's smoothly,it's oddly satisfying, every level is a different color and a different shape and the Ad's on YouTube made me want to play this game. But there was this one Ad were everytime you completed level you could strip a hot babe,but when people started playing the game there was no hot chick. perhaps it might have been a Hoax or someone got paid to edit that part. Besides that I suggest that you should play this game.

This game is really fun. But it as a lot of ads I hate ads 😴. It has many beautiful sinks and the sinks makes me smile when I am sad. Just fix the problem of ads. The game has many levels it's a game like never ending game 😄. I really like never ending games . There is a smiley face ball also and they has fork , knife and darts also in the sinks . The game is so easy you just have to hold or tap. The fire at the back of your sink means you can break the black block also 😊this is the best part

This game is kinda relaxing and a stress reliever except one major problem, there are ads after every level. It gets really annoying when I'm just trying to fly through the levels (I am on 374) but then an ad will pop up randomly in the middle of the level and I don't want to pay to remove ads. if the ad problem is ever fixed and you're the person who loves easy going games this one would definitely be for you!

Overall brilliant game!! There are so many skins and all the different coloured platforms were so aesthetically pleasing. Especially when you hold it down and the fireball effect was amazing. Also the gradients were amazing and it was all so thought out. So far, perfect gameplay. My main issue is that there are way way to many ads. Like one after every try, even if I won. At least 30 seconds of a video ad and then about 20 seconds of an interactive game. If number of ads is reduced, then maybe 5✨

i think this game is a great game to play when you get bored, or if you want ti kill time. I think i found some glitches you guys might be able to fix 1. I only did this once, but I somehow clipped on to the breaking board and i slowed down. it worked when I had my finger on the screen, but when I didn't it stopped. The speed of the ball only slowed nothing else. 2. if you tap rappidly you can sort of touch the black while tapping alot.(try your self 3. if you tap rapidly you can skip few blocks

It's a really simple and fun game. It's very satisfying and stress-relieving too. But...the adds are insane. Also, it should be more challenging...I don't know if they made it like that for a reason but its like overly easy.🙄 Plus, it would be awesome if they could add more skins. Otherwise, this game is super popular and fun for all so I reccomend it to you.😊

I love this game and it definitely deserves a five star rating but there is sooo many adds and it takes away the experience sometimes. but it is fun especially if you get bored easily. there is hundreds of different levels and when you get to the bottom there is more. there is a mystery box at the end and if you are good enough to get it you get a limited edition skin. so download if you are looking for some fun!!!!!!! it is especially good for long road trips once you start you can't stop. I 🩷

This game is fun!!! I enjoy playing this game a lot! the problem is it has identical levels like level 27 and 34 and level 46 and 47 the colors are different and the level is the same but it's really boring to repeat the levels over and over again why can't there be different levels? Plz fix this and try to think of a different level. Plz! Thanks for reading and good luck passing the levels and plz fix this. Goodbye!!👋👋👋👋

Great game that doesn't need much thought to it. It's a perfect mindless game for using the bathroom, when you're bored in class or are anxious. BUT there are ads galore. Even when you die and it says "Watch an ad to continue where you left off" or something along those lines and you click no it STILL gives you one!!

Great game to play in the car! When you have no internet, and you want to play a multiplayer game but you can't, this game makes up for it! Great time killer! Recommended. The reason this is a four is the ads! Come to think of it, I should have rated it a three. The ADS are crazy. I finish a game, click 'Continue' or whatever, and a ad pops up 80% of the time. Very hard to work. Low graphic games mostly make me bored but this doesn't! Honest Review by Anna's Slimes. Relaxing. Challenging.

This game is great, it is addictive, but after playing for a while it seems like there's no point to continue. I would hope that there could be a achievement list, or we could connect with friends and see who can reach the next level fastest, whoever gets the least amount of deaths wins. I imagine things like that added to the game to make it more fun for the people who have already unlocked everything.

Its a really good game! I only have 2 complaints, and that is the ads, there are wayyy to many. I understand you need to make money but please not after every single level? And the second one is it lags out quite often, and its not just my phone i tried it on my friends phones. But yeah its pretty addictive, and it has loads of potential.

This game is a great way to pass the time, good for hand-eye coordination. Not quite as good as Stack Fall by Voodoo Games--this one is too slow IMO--but Voodoo messed up the Android version of their game with ads you can't opt out of, whereas this Stack Ball game allows you to choose a well worth it $2.99 for ad-free fun. Yes I'd recommend this one.

It's addictive though simple; deceptively simple. Only issues I have are that it chews through the battery charge and it's a bit repetitive. Maybe add in sections that rotate at different speeds from the rest in the higher levels to add to the challenge and find a way for it to use less power... Otherwise, great game!

To me this app is pretty fun and the levels are so cool because of all the different colors 🌈. But I do have a few complaints. First of all sometimes the ads are a little inappropriate for kids. Also it makes you cheat which to me isn't really fair but over all it's a fun game if maybe these changes are made I would probably give this app 5 stars.

star_5.text: cool helps with stress 😬😬💯.this game is so good my kids like play it if my older daughter is bored she plays this game like middle child she plays yh is every afternoon when is after school my husband always plays it and make the kids 🫩
love this it is one of the best ever it is really, really relaxing.And it has the cutest little skins, so cute love ❤️ 😍 💖 ❣️ 💕 💘 ❤️ 😍
The game is actually fantastic I loved a lot but the worst part is that I am very much frustrated with lots of ads come after each level 😔😔
I like this app a lot.It never glitches and is amusing while I wait in appointments.

1. Hate ads? Airplane mode. (I'd also suggest spending money, but another review had me nervous like it'd be a waste.) 2. Game has been very useful to help hold off my anxiety. 3. Currently on level 1782. It's not a challenging game... (save for ads that, majority of the time, cause lag so they can load while trying to play the very short level.) 4. & 5. Only complaints: there isn't much of a gap between successful levels and ads; battery killer!

on level 64 within 30mins. very relaxing actually. I could see myself using this as a distraction during an anxiety attack. cool game and its actually FUN to play 😀. The ONLY downside like everyone else on here has already mentioned is the amount of ads. The ads last longer than it takes to finish a level, and you have to sit there and watch an ad after EVERY level. the length of the ads are ridiculous. At least something like YouTube only makes you sit through 3-5seconds to skip ad not 40secs
I'm not sure if it's the software on my phone. but the game seems to be freezing up a lot. I'm pretty sure it's my cell phone. other than that it's a very nice game

Really good game and I LOVE IT, if you play it offline there are definitely no adds and its really addictive and I love the colour transition its soo smooth and cool. It obviously needs to improve the level of difficulty and needs to come up with different types and colors of stacks, I'm in level 1500 and absolutely never lost any game cause its soo easy. Hope you solve the above problems. Definitely a nice game to pass your time 👍

This is a awesome game!!I love it because to me its so challenging and its easy the same time but I keep failing sometimes and I actually really want to try this game but not enough storage but since today I have delete some apps I don't need because I was desperate to have more games in my phone and since I have enough,I installed it today and it was so much fun!!Also for ads haters,you know theres not that much ads right?Just get used to it!And keep it up and make more awesome apps or games!!

Amazing and satisfying game! obviously one of those kinds of games that are so ASMR that you play as a ball and destroy stuff in your path to get to the end of a level, like you can just play this game on your Phone or Tablet anytime you want, and since that I'm on Tablet, im having a great entertainment experience on a bigger screen like this! and this game is basically kinda like Helix Jump, but you destroy stuff in your path and go down to finish the level, So, why not play this? Fun Game! 👍

Amazing game! i enjoy playing during freetime. I'm having an issue with ads. i purchased no ads, yet i still get them after every level as well as after hitting a platform/running outta lifes. This game is great! Its honestly amazing! All you have to do is turn on airplane mode and your ready to go. Ik there r many ads so airplane mode is really useful. You should try it too. I LOVE THIS GAME!! I've had this game on multiple phones because it's so good! Everything about it is great. There aren't much ads (which I know everyone hates), a reasonable amount of them. You get a great game for a low amount of space! (Performs super fast to) This game definitely deserves !FIVE STARS!🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

This game is addictive, fun and you can play it absolutely anywhere. With games like these, usually levels are hard and you spend many long, frustrating minutes trying to beat it. Here though, you can play it endlessly with no annoyance, just pure fun! I would really recommend this game! But maybe you can add a more things to do, like multiplayer or something.

Very bad game in the world Guide your ball to victory no matter what tries to stop it. Stack Ball is a 3d arcade game where players smash, bump and bounce through revolving helix platforms to reach the end. Sound easy? You wish!! Your ball smashes like a brick through colorful platforms that block its descent, but if you hit a black one, it's all over! Your ball shatters to pieces and you have to start your fall all over again. But even black platforms are no match for a fireball falling at

Its a great game. But the thing that i would like to be changed about it is; try to make the fire ball a bit longer and try to add more balls, and the amount of ads are mind blowing! Please try to reduce the ads! But at last its a great game and its really fun to play, and out of all the games i have on my phone...i find my self clicking the game and playing it for hours!
